name: agency-memory
description: Per-client, no-mixing memory engine for agencies: deterministic context loading, weekly consolidation, human-approved candidate review, a self-improving tool-craft loop (mine recurring tool mistakes -> WARN gates), and cheap-Dreaming client-learning mining from raw transcripts.

python.title: Python command
python.description: The command that runs Python 3 on your machine. Usually 'python3' on macOS/Linux and 'python' on Windows. If unsure, run the bundled install script - it detects (or installs) Python and tells you exactly what to enter here.
